description: Accepted common-window benchmark using the official TiVA endpoint and accepted frozen inputs.
Eurostat reaches 2025, but TiVA is not carried forward; Poland 2025 has no import-content profile.
Official TiVA profile is held at 2022 for Poland's import-content state; Eurostat variables use 2025 availability with complete-case missingness.
Same mixed-window design, but Ireland is removed from the full panel as a missing-data sensitivity.
Mechanical TiVA 2022 carry-forward to 2023-2025; included only to bound sensitivity, not as official evidence.
TiVA-dependent candidates use the official TiVA endpoint/window; non-TiVA candidates use natural 2025 Eurostat availability.
